subject: Duplicate charge on account + can't log in
body:
Hi support,

I've been charged twice for my subscription this month. I can see two identical charges of $2,000 on April 1st on my credit card. On top of that, my account appears to be locked — I cannot log in and my whole team is affected.

This is extremely urgent. Our contract renews in 3 days and we cannot afford any downtime. Please help immediately.

Marcus Wei
Global Tech Solutions

subject: GDPR data export 8 days overdue + overbilling for cancelled seats
body:
Hi,

Two separate issues I need resolved urgently:

1. DATA EXPORT: I submitted a GDPR Article 20 (right to data portability) request 8 days ago and have not received any acknowledgement. Our legal team is now involved and we are tracking this for regulatory compliance purposes.

2. OVERBILLING: We cancelled 5 seats on January 1st and were confirmed via email. However, we have been charged for those 5 seats in February, March, and April — a total of £270 in excess charges.

If these are not resolved by end of this week we will be cancelling our subscription and filing a formal complaint with the ICO.

Nina Osei
Head of Compliance, CloudBase Inc
